profile_target.reason: top non-linalg production row in the post-pass60 RCH eval sweep

baseline.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-fj-lax-pass61-eval-profile cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- eval/ --sample-size 10 --measurement-time 1 --warm-up-time 1

candidate.lever: route dense F64 unary tensor inputs through LiteralBuffer::as_f64_slice and TensorValue::new_f64_values
candidate.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-fj-lax-pass61-bench-sin cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- eval/sin_64k_f64 --sample-size 20 --measurement-time 2 --warm-up-time 1

candidate_tests: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-fj-lax-pass61-fast-path-tests cargo test -p fj-lax fast_path -- --nocapture
behavior_proof.isomorphism: row-major order, per-element f64::sin bits, dtype, malformed fallback, tie-breaking, floating-point operation order, and RNG surface unchanged

decision: rejected because the candidate rebench regressed the profiled target; production source was restored
next_primitive: deeper dense transcendental algorithm, not output-storage wrapping
